name: LSD

dosing: Standard busting dose is around 100mcg (one tab), providing full psychoactive effects for cycle-breaking
Sub-hallucinogenic microdoses of 10-40mcg are used by those who want to avoid a full trip while still getting preventive benefit
Lower doses of 50-75mcg (half a tab) offer a middle ground with mild effects
preparations: Most commonly available as paper blotter tabs, which are held under the tongue or swallowed
Liquid LSD can be taken on sugar cubes or candy, or measured volumetrically from a solution for precise microdosing
schedule: Standard busting protocol is one dose every 5 days until the cycle breaks, typically requiring 2-3 doses over 2-3 weeks
A minimum 5-day detox from triptans is required before the first dose to avoid blocking the effects
Some users microdose daily for 5-7 consecutive days as an alternative to the spaced protocol

sideEffects: Temporary increase in attack frequency before improvement
Anxiety and existential dread during the experience
Tingling in the trigeminal nerve area
